Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus To Review Administrative Decision
Off Calendar Nov-18-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MORGAN ONEILL'S Petition For Writ Of Mandamus To Review Administrative Decision is off calendar. Order Granting Writ of Mandamus filed on November 13, 2015. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not Reported. (302/EHG)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus To Review Administrative Decision
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. STEVEN TAXMAN, TEL. NO. 1-707-800-3901 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. WILLIAM T. DARDEN, OFFICE OF THE ATTORNEY GENERAL, TEL. NO. 1-510-622-2196 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER MORGAN ONEILL'S Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandamus To Review Administrative Decision is continued to November 18, 2015 and deemed submitted on that date. Petitioner's counsel to prepare form of order for the court's consideration. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =(302/EHg)
